chapter_title.en: The Method of Ghusl for Janabah (ritual Bath for Sexual impurity)

text: 185 - وَ كَانَ عَلِيٌّ عَلَيْهِ اَلسَّلاَمُ يَقُولُ: «كَيْفَ لاَ يُوجِبُ اَلْغُسْلَ وَ اَلْحَدُّ يَجِبُ فِيهِ » وَقَالَ «يَجِبُ عَلَيْهِ اَلْمَهْرُ وَ اَلْغُسْلُ.

en.bab-ul-qaim-publications:
Hadith.185 - Imam Ali ibn Abi Talib (as) would say: 'How can ghusl (ritual bathing) not be obligatory when the Hadd (prescribed punishment) is applicable in such a case (if it is adultery)?".
Imam (as) said: 'The dowry and ghusl become obligatory upon him’
